payload.delta:
. I added a "Get in touch" call-to-action button to the hero section of `index.html`:

- **New custom property**: `--highlight: #f
bbf24` (warm amber) in the existing `:root` palette — it stands out against the page's teal/

purple accents.
- **Button style** (`.cta`): pill-shaped filled button using `
background: var(--highlight)` with dark text, matching the rounded style of the existing contact links, plus a subtle hover

fade.
- **Placement**: right after the intro paragraph in the header, linking to `#contact` —
I added that id to the "Get in touch" section so the page's existing smooth scrolling carries the click down
